title: pimpinella koelzii
intro: Pimpinella koelzii, also known as Bhutan Pimpinella or Koelz's Pimpinella, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Traditionally, Pimpinella koelzii is prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to make various herbal preparations, such as capsules and powders, to treat a range of health issues.
